passive.name: Lightslinger
passive.description: Whenever Lucian uses an ability, his next attack becomes a double-shot. When Lucian is healed or shielded by an ally, or when a nearby enemy Champion is immobilized, his next 2 basic attacks will deal bonus magic damage.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} After casting an ability, {{cis|Lucian}} next [[basic attack]] within a few seconds fires a second attack that deals {{as|'''reduced''' physical damage}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Innate - Vigilance:}} Whenever '''Lucian''' is {{tip|heal|healed}} or {{tip|shield|shielded}}, or when a nearby enemy is {{tip|immobilized}}, his next two shots within a few seconds are empowered to deal {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}}. The shots can stack up to a cap.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} After casting an [[champion ability|ability]], '''Lucian's''' next [[basic attack]] within {{fd|3.5}} seconds fires an additional shot {{tip|on-attack}} after {{fd|0.25}} seconds, which deals {{as|{{pp|key=%|50 to 60|1;7;13}} AD {{as|physical damage}}}}, increased to {{as|100% AD}} against {{tip|minion|minions}}. He will shoot the same target, else another target in range.
wiki_detail.description2: The second shot applies {{tip|on-hit}} and {{tip|on-attack}} effects at 100% effectiveness and is affected by {{tip|critical strike}} modifiers.
wiki_detail.description3: {{sbc|Innate - Vigilance:}} Whenever '''Lucian''' is {{tip|heal|healed}} or {{tip|shield|shielded}} by an ally, or an enemy champion within 1000 units is {{tip|immobilized}}, his next two shots within 6 seconds are empowered to deal {{as|15|magic damage}} {{as|(+ 20% AD)}} {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} {{tip|on-hit}}. He can store up to 4 empowered shots at a time.
wiki_detail.spellshield:
|notes        = 
* ''Lightslinger'' is triggered and consumed by the first attack, even if no target can be found upon firing the second attack.
* The second attack, if the initial target was killed, will prioritize enemy champions regardless of having {{tip|sight}} of them or not and enemy {{tip|minion|minions}} with {{sti|health|{{as|low health}}}}.
* '''Lucian''' can perform actions freely while firing ''Lightslinger'' since the second attack is integrated into the first one.
** The second attack has special movement animations depending on the direction '''Lucian''' is moving while firing.
* The second attack counts as a separate hit for effects such as {{ri|Electrocute}}, {{iis|Muramana}} {{nie|Shock}}, and {{iis|Eclipse}} {{nie|Ever Rising Moon}}.
* The second attack separately rolls {{WRtip|critical strike}}.
* The empowered shots will apply against structures.

Q.name: Piercing Light
Q.description: Lucian shoots a bolt of piercing light through a target.
Q.tooltip:
Lucian shoots a bolt of piercing light, dealing {{ totaldamage }} physical damage.
{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Lucian}} fires a laser in a line in the direction of the target enemy, dealing {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Lucian''' fires a laser in a line in the direction of the target enemy that deals {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit.
wiki_detail.description2: ''Piercing Light's cast time ends prematurely if the initial target dies, allowing '''Lucian''' to attack and move freely, or to immediately begin casting either {{ai|W|Lucian}} or {{ai|R|Lucian}}.{{bug|2}}''
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Piercing Light'' will attempt to lead the target if it is moving but does not adjust further during the cast time (enemies can dodge the laser if they change their position by a sufficient amount during the cast time).
* '''Lucian''' can buffer {{ai|W|Lucian}} or {{ai|R|Lucian}} during the cast time. {{ai|E|Lucian}} is locked out.
** This is why '''Lucian''' can use them early if the cast time prematurely ends.

W.name: Ardent Blaze
W.description: Lucian shoots a missile that explodes in a star shape, marking and briefly revealing enemies. Lucian gains Move Speed for attacking marked enemies.
W.tooltip:
Lucian fires a shot that explodes at the end of its range or on the first enemy hit, dealing {{ totaldamage }} magic damage, briefly revealing enemies and marking them for 6 seconds.

When Lucian or an ally damages a marked enemy, Lucian gains {{ e2 }} Move Speed for 1 second. Allies triggering this effect will also grant Lucian Vigilance.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Lucian}} fires a missile in the target direction that explodes in a cross pattern upon hitting an enemy or maximum range, dealing {{as|magic damage}} and marking enemies hit.
wiki_detail.blurb3: '''Lucian''' briefly gains {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} when he or allied champions damage a marked target. Allied champions triggering this effect grant '''Lucian''' ''{{ai|Lightslinger|Lucian|Vigilance}}''.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Lucian''' fires a missile in the target direction that explodes in a cross pattern upon hitting an enemy or reaching maximum range, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit and granting {{tip|sight}} of the area for 1 second.
wiki_detail.description2: Enemies hit are marked for 6 seconds.
wiki_detail.description3: '''Lucian''' gains {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} for 1 second when he or allied champions damage a marked target. Allied champions triggering this effect grant '''Lucian''' ''{{ai|Lightslinger|Lucian|Vigilance}}''.
wiki_detail.width: {{tip|er|icononly = true}} {{tt|110|initial missile width}}<!-- / {{tt|X|length of star tips}} / {{tt|X|width of star tips}}-->
wiki_detail.notes:
{{Effect at cast time end}}
** Like most [[projectile|missiles]], it will not collide with enemies whose center is beyond the maximum range (not behind '''Lucian'''), but this determines only the center and timing of the explosion.
* ''Ardent Blaze'' will cast from wherever '''Lucian''' is at the end of the cast time.
* '''Lucian''' will not gain ''Ardent Blaze's'' bonus movement speed if attacks on {{as|marked|buzzword}} targets are {{tip|dodge|dodged}}, {{tip|block|blocked}}, or if missed while the attacker is {{tip|blind|blinded}}.
* {{tip|persistent damage|DoTs}} will proc ''Ardent Blaze'' only once.
* {{tip|Spell shield}} will not prevent the mark.
_comments: / {{tt|X|length of star tips}} / {{tt|X|width of star tips}}

E.name: Relentless Pursuit
E.description: Lucian quickly dashes a short distance. Lightslinger attacks reduce Relentless Pursuit's cooldown.
E.tooltip:
Lucian dashes.

Cooldown is reduced by {{ e1 }} second whenever Lucian hits an enemy with Lightslinger ({{ e2 }} seconds for champions). {{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Passive:}} ''Relentless Pursuit's'' cooldown is {{sti|cdr|reduced}} for each ''{{ai|Lightslinger|Lucian}}'' shot hit, doubled against enemy {{tip|champions}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Passive:}} ''Relentless Pursuit's'' {{sti|'''current''' cooldown}} is reduced by 1 second for each ''{{ai|Lightslinger|Lucian}}'' shot hit, doubled to 2 seconds against enemy {{tip|champions}}.
wiki_detail.description3: ''Relentless Pursuit {{tip|basic attack reset|resets}} '''Lucian's''' basic attack timer. '''Lucian''' can cast any of his [[champion ability|abilities]] during the dash. Relentless Pursuit can be cast during {{ais|W|Lucian}} cast time and during {{ais|R|Lucian}} channel. Relentless Pursuit will cast at max range if cast beyond that.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* Additional on-hits during ''Lightslinger'' are not considered for the cooldown reduction (i.e {{ii|Runaan's Hurricane}}, {{ii|Guinsoo's Rageblade}}).
* Unlike some dashes, '''Lucian's''' dash speed does ''not'' scale with his {{as|movement speed}}.
* ''Relentless Pursuit's'' dash can go through terrain, but will not be extended further if the target location is within terrain, unlike other dashes, like {{ci|Ekko}}'s {{ai|Phase Dive|Ekko}}.
* Casting ''Relentless Pursuit'' directly after attacking with ''Lightslinger'' will reduce Relentless Pursuit's cooldown when the projectiles hit the target.
* ''Relentless Pursuit'' can be cast during {{sis|Recall}} cast time.
** If ''Relentless Pursuit'' is cast just as the cast time ends, '''Lucian''' will not perform his Recall animation, instead staying idle. This allows '''Lucian''' to use his [[Emoting|emotes]] during his Recall.

R.name: The Culling
R.description: Lucian unleashes a torrent of shots from his weapons.
R.tooltip:
Lucian rapidly fires {{ totalnumshots }} shots in a direction for {{ duration }} seconds or until he Recasts. Each shot deals {{ damageperbullet }} physical damage to the first enemy hit.

While firing, Lucian may use Relentless Pursuit.

Total Damage: {{ totaldamage }} physical damage
{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Lucian}} {{tip|channel|channels}} for a few seconds to rapidly fire a torrent of bullets in the target direction. Each shot deals {{as|physical damage}} to the first enemy hit. ''The Culling'' can be recast within the duration.
wiki_detail.blurb2: While channeling, '''Lucian''' is {{tip|ghosted}} and may still move.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Lucian''' {{tip|channel|channels}} for up to 3 seconds, rapidly firing up to 22 {{as|(+ 1 per 4% critical strike chance)}} shots in the target direction. Each shot deals {{as|physical damage}} to the first enemy hit, doubled against {{tip|minion|minions}}. ''The Culling'' can be recast after {{fd|0.75}} seconds during the channel, and does so automatically when the channel ends.
wiki_detail.leveling:
{{st|Physical Damage Per Shot|{{ap|15 to 45 3}} {{as|(+ 25% AD)}} {{as|(+ 15% AP)}}|Additional Damage per 20% Crit Chance|{{ap|15*5 to 45*5 3}} {{as|(+ 125% AD)}} {{as|(+ 75% AP)}}|Total Physical Damage|{{ap|15*22 to 45*22 3}} {{as|(+ 550% AD)}} {{as|(+ 330% AP)}} + {{ap|15 to 45 3}} {{as|(+ 25% AD)}} {{as|(+ 15% AP)}} per {{as|4% critical strike chance}}}}
{{st|Minion Damage Per Shot|{{ap|15*2 to 45*2 3}} {{as|(+ 50% AD)}} {{as|(+ 30% AP)}}|Additional Minion Damage per 20% Crit Chance|{{ap|15*5*2 to 45*5*2 3}} {{as|(+ 250% AD)}} {{as|(+ 150% AP)}}|Total Minion Damage|{{ap|15*22*2 to 45*22*2 3}} {{as|(+ 1100% AD)}} {{as|(+ 660% AP)}} + {{ap|15*2 to 45*2 3}} {{as|(+ 50% AD)}} {{as|(+ 30% AP)}} per {{as|4% critical strike chance}}}}
wiki_detail.description2: While channeling, '''Lucian''' is {{tip|ghosted}} and may still move.
wiki_detail.notes:
* At {{as|100% critical strike chance}}, ''The Culling'' fires up to 25 additional shots, for a total of 47 shots.
** The '''total''' damage at the maximum number of shots (at {{as|100% critical strike chance}}) is {{as|{{ap|15*47 to 45*47}}|physical damage}} {{as|(+ {{ap|25*47}}% AD)}} {{as|(+ {{ap|15*47}}% AP)}} {{as|physical damage}}.
** Against minions, this is increased to {{as|{{ap|15*47*2 to 45*47*2}}|physical damage}} {{as|(+ {{ap|25*47*2}}% AD)}} {{as|(+ {{ap|15*47*2}}% AP)}}.
* The fire rate increases with the number of shots.
* During ''The Culling'', '''Lucian's''' facing direction is in the direction that he is firing.
* '''Lucian''' can interact with {{ai|Dark Passage|Thresh}} or allied {{ai|Devour|Tahm Kench}} without {{tip|interrupt|interrupting}} ''The Culling''.
* ''The Culling'' creates the shots at an offset of 35 units to the front plus 35 units towards each side of '''Lucian''' (sides alternating, first shot fired from '''Lucian's''' right gun), unlike the missiles of most abilities.
* The damage dealt by each bullet of ''The Culling'' is calculated when the bullet reaches a target, just like single missile abilities.
* {{tip|Spell shield}} only blocks one instance of damage.
* The following table refers for interactions while '''Lucian''' is {{tip|channel|channeling}}:
{{ct|channel|cast={{ai|Relentless Pursuit|Lucian}} is usable. {{ai|Piercing Light|Lucian}} and {{ai|Ardent Blaze|Lucian}} are disabled. This ability recasts to end channel.|move=true|items=true,true,interrupts,true,true|attack=false|spells=true,true,true,false,false}}
